channel.title: TikTok Shop Dev Updates
channel.description: Official updates for TikTok Shop developer docs

item.title: Post Shoppable Video and Photos APIs v202607: New Fields Added
item.description: # Summary Post Shoppable Video API v202607 adds a new request field, `video_info.is_ai_generated`, to indicate whether the submitted video content is AI generated. When this field is set to `true`, the published post will display an AI generated label. Post Shoppable Video API and Post Shoppable Photos API also add a new response field, `quota`, to return the creator's content posting quota when quota restrictions apply. # What is changing The following fields are added in v202607. | API | Locat...
item.content:encoded: # Summary Post Shoppable Video API v202607 adds a new request field, `video_info.is_ai_generated`, to indicate whether the submitted video content is AI generated. When this field is set to `true`, the published post will display an AI generated label. Post Shoppable Video API and Post Shoppable Photos API also add a new response field, `quota`, to return the creator's content posting quota when quota restrictions apply. # What is changing The following fields are added in v202607. | API | Locat...

item.title: TTS Open Toolkit: Make your AI assistant fluent in TTS integration!
item.description: TTS Open Toolkit is a CLI for TikTok Shop OpenAPI developers. The official release installs and updates TTS OpenAPI skills for your AI coding agent, connects App and Shop context, helps complete required scopes, and validates supported API calls after authorization so you can integrate and troubleshoot faster. # 如何安装 // Getting started ## Agent 直接安装（推荐）// Let your agent install it (recommended) > 目前已经支持 Codex、Claude Code 、 Trae 。如果你同时使用多个 Agent，可以分别执行对应命令。后续如果希望支持 Cursor、Windsurf、Cline 或其他 Agent...
item.content:encoded: TTS Open Toolkit is a CLI for TikTok Shop OpenAPI developers. The official release installs and updates TTS OpenAPI skills for your AI coding agent, connects App and Shop context, helps complete required scopes, and validates supported API calls after authorization so you can integrate and troubleshoot faster. # 如何安装 // Getting started ## Agent 直接安装（推荐）// Let your agent install it (recommended) > 目前已经支持 Codex、Claude Code 、 Trae 。如果你同时使用多个 Agent，可以分别执行对应命令。后续如果希望支持 Cursor、Windsurf、Cline 或其他 Agent...

item.title: Product APIs Support Customer Purchase Limits Configuration
item.description: # What is changing? TikTok Shop is adding customer purchase limit configuration to Product APIs. This allows sellers and partners to configure product-level purchase limits through API, instead of relying only on Seller Center PC settings. The change aligns API capabilities with the existing Seller Center PC experience and helps partners such as ERP / integration platforms keep their product templates, downstream systems, and TikTok Shop product rules consistent. ### Which APIs are affected? | A...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? TikTok Shop is adding customer purchase limit configuration to Product APIs. This allows sellers and partners to configure product-level purchase limits through API, instead of relying only on Seller Center PC settings. The change aligns API capabilities with the existing Seller Center PC experience and helps partners such as ERP / integration platforms keep their product templates, downstream systems, and TikTok Shop product rules consistent. ### Which APIs are affected? | A...

item.title: For All Markets: Create FBT MCF Order Request Parameter district_or_county now optional
item.description: # 1. Overview This release updates the **Create FBT MCF Order** API. The request parameter `district_or_county` has been changed from **required** to **optional**. Previously, callers had to always provide `district_or_county` when creating a Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT) Merchant-Configured Fulfillment (MCF) order. With this change, the field is no longer mandatory, so orders can be created even when the district or county information is not available on the caller's side. # 2. Change Details | **A...
item.content:encoded: # 1. Overview This release updates the **Create FBT MCF Order** API. The request parameter `district_or_county` has been changed from **required** to **optional**. Previously, callers had to always provide `district_or_county` when creating a Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT) Merchant-Configured Fulfillment (MCF) order. With this change, the field is no longer mandatory, so orders can be created even when the district or county information is not available on the caller's side. # 2. Change Details | **A...

item.title: For Indonesia Market: Get Toko Product Mappers API Release
item.description: # 1. Overview This release introduces a new open API, **Get Toko Product Mappers**, which converts **Tokopedia (Toko) product IDs into their corresponding TikTok Shop (TTS) product IDs**. It is designed for affiliate / rebate partners who operate on Tokopedia product identifiers but need to retrieve the equivalent TikTok Shop product information (such as price and commission) to power their offer and rebate services. Previously, partners serving Toko affiliate rebate channels had no reliable way...
item.content:encoded: # 1. Overview This release introduces a new open API, **Get Toko Product Mappers**, which converts **Tokopedia (Toko) product IDs into their corresponding TikTok Shop (TTS) product IDs**. It is designed for affiliate / rebate partners who operate on Tokopedia product identifiers but need to retrieve the equivalent TikTok Shop product information (such as price and commission) to power their offer and rebate services. Previously, partners serving Toko affiliate rebate channels had no reliable way...

item.title: For All Markets : New properties added to Finance transaction APIs
item.description: ## Overview Three Finance transaction APIs are getting new return properties. The change is **additive and backward compatible** — no existing field is removed or modified. The affected APIs are: * **Get Transactions by Order** * **Get Transactions by Statement** * **Get Unsettled Transaction** In summary, the three new properties are: * **tiktok_shop_shipping_incentive_amount** — the shipping incentive granted by the platform to the merchant. * **cps_shop_ads_commission_tax_amount** — the tax c...
item.content:encoded: ## Overview Three Finance transaction APIs are getting new return properties. The change is **additive and backward compatible** — no existing field is removed or modified. The affected APIs are: * **Get Transactions by Order** * **Get Transactions by Statement** * **Get Unsettled Transaction** In summary, the three new properties are: * **tiktok_shop_shipping_incentive_amount** — the shipping incentive granted by the platform to the merchant. * **cps_shop_ads_commission_tax_amount** — the tax c...

item.title: US & UK Markets: Replacement Orders
item.description: **Effective date:** July 8, 2026 ## What's changing TikTok buyers will have the ability to request a replacement shipment, which means they will keep the original item in the event their order has been marked as `delivered` and meets one of the following criteria: * Non-returnable item + seller fault (damaged items/packaging) * Non-returnable item + DNR (Delivered, not received) * Returnable item + DNR (Delivered, not received) # Impact This is a backward-compatible change and will not require a...
item.content:encoded: **Effective date:** July 8, 2026 ## What's changing TikTok buyers will have the ability to request a replacement shipment, which means they will keep the original item in the event their order has been marked as `delivered` and meets one of the following criteria: * Non-returnable item + seller fault (damaged items/packaging) * Non-returnable item + DNR (Delivered, not received) * Returnable item + DNR (Delivered, not received) # Impact This is a backward-compatible change and will not require a...

item.title: US & UK Markets: Exchange Orders
item.description: **Effective date:** July 8, 2026 ## What's changing TikTok buyers will have the ability to perform an exchange, which is initiated through their return journey within the TikTok application. This allows sellers to save GMV, rather than just giving a refund for a returned item. When a buyer submits an exchange, there are new API fields within the Returns & Orders API that identify an exchange is required. # Impact This is a backward-compatible change and will not require a new API version. Existi...
item.content:encoded: **Effective date:** July 8, 2026 ## What's changing TikTok buyers will have the ability to perform an exchange, which is initiated through their return journey within the TikTok application. This allows sellers to save GMV, rather than just giving a refund for a returned item. When a buyer submits an exchange, there are new API fields within the Returns & Orders API that identify an exchange is required. # Impact This is a backward-compatible change and will not require a new API version. Existi...

item.title: For Malaysia Market: Add Mandatory Attributes to Household Appliances Category
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 1 August 2026, partners will be required to provide several mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under Household Appliances category in the list: | **Leaf Category Name** | **Leaf Category Id** | **Attribute Name** | **Attribute Id** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Cleaning Equipment | 851080 | Corded/Cordless | 100292 | | Electric Mops | 934152 | Corded/Cordless | 100292 | | Electric Window Cleaners | 601116 | Corded/Cordless...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 1 August 2026, partners will be required to provide several mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under Household Appliances category in the list: | **Leaf Category Name** | **Leaf Category Id** | **Attribute Name** | **Attribute Id** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Cleaning Equipment | 851080 | Corded/Cordless | 100292 | | Electric Mops | 934152 | Corded/Cordless | 100292 | | Electric Window Cleaners | 601116 | Corded/Cordless...

item.title: For SEA Market: Add Mandatory Attributes to Baby&Maternity and Automotive&Motorcycle Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 1 August 2026, partners will be required to provide two mandatory product attributes "Recommended Age" and "Baby Life Stage" to Baby & Maternity category, another two mandatory product attributes "Applicable Brand" and "Model" to Automotive & Motorcycle category. # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local and cross border sellers in SEA market. # Who is affected? Developers with applications that use [Create Product](ht...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 1 August 2026, partners will be required to provide two mandatory product attributes "Recommended Age" and "Baby Life Stage" to Baby & Maternity category, another two mandatory product attributes "Applicable Brand" and "Model" to Automotive & Motorcycle category. # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local and cross border sellers in SEA market. # Who is affected? Developers with applications that use [Create Product](ht...

item.title: For US Markets: Introducing room_id in Order APIs
item.description: **Effective date:** July 8, 2026 ## Overview Starting July 8, 2026, TikTok Shop will add `room_id` to selected Order API responses so your app can identify the LIVE session where an order line item was created. This change applies to apps that integrate with Order APIs for US market, especially apps that help LIVE sellers sort, reconcile, and fulfill orders by LIVE session. This is a non-breaking enhancement. Existing integrations will continue to work if they do not read the new field. ## What ...
item.content:encoded: **Effective date:** July 8, 2026 ## Overview Starting July 8, 2026, TikTok Shop will add `room_id` to selected Order API responses so your app can identify the LIVE session where an order line item was created. This change applies to apps that integrate with Order APIs for US market, especially apps that help LIVE sellers sort, reconcile, and fulfill orders by LIVE session. This is a non-breaking enhancement. Existing integrations will continue to work if they do not read the new field. ## What ...

item.title: For Thailand Market: Add TIS Certificate Mark on the Product Label as a Mandatory Qualification for 13 Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 5 August 2026, partners will be required to add TIS(Thai Industrial Standard) certificate mark on the product label as a mandatory qualification when listing or editing products by using API for 13 categories. This information will be put into the "certifications" parameter in the API. Here is the category list: | **First_category_name** | **Second_category_name** | **Leaf_category_name** | **Leaf_category_id** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Household Appliances ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 5 August 2026, partners will be required to add TIS(Thai Industrial Standard) certificate mark on the product label as a mandatory qualification when listing or editing products by using API for 13 categories. This information will be put into the "certifications" parameter in the API. Here is the category list: | **First_category_name** | **Second_category_name** | **Leaf_category_name** | **Leaf_category_id** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Household Appliances ...

item.title: For Thailand Market: Add TIS Mandatory Attributes to Several Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 5 August 2026, partners will be required to provide TIS(Thai Industrial Standard) mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories in the list: | Category Name | Category Id | Mandatory Attribute Name | Attribute Id | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Hair Dryers | 874376 | TIS License No. | 103637 | | | | TIS License URL | 103636 | | Power Banks | 910728 | TIS License No. | 103637 | | | | TIS License URL | 1036...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 5 August 2026, partners will be required to provide TIS(Thai Industrial Standard) mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories in the list: | Category Name | Category Id | Mandatory Attribute Name | Attribute Id | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Hair Dryers | 874376 | TIS License No. | 103637 | | | | TIS License URL | 103636 | | Power Banks | 910728 | TIS License No. | 103637 | | | | TIS License URL | 1036...

item.title: For the US Market: Masking Recipient Phone Number and Address for 4PL Orders
item.description: **Effective date:** July 13 2026 * **Markets:** US * **Scope:** 4PL orders * **Audience:** Apps that read order data from the Order APIs ## Overview Starting July 13 2026, TikTok Shop will mask the recipient phone number and detailed shipping address for **4PL orders in the US market**. The change applies across all order statuses and affects data returned by the Order APIs. This update strengthens buyer data protection by limiting access to buyer contact details that are not needed to fulfill a...
item.content:encoded: **Effective date:** July 13 2026 * **Markets:** US * **Scope:** 4PL orders * **Audience:** Apps that read order data from the Order APIs ## Overview Starting July 13 2026, TikTok Shop will mask the recipient phone number and detailed shipping address for **4PL orders in the US market**. The change applies across all order statuses and affects data returned by the Order APIs. This update strengthens buyer data protection by limiting access to buyer contact details that are not needed to fulfill a...

item.title: For Thailand market: Set Fda Food Registration Number On Product Label as a Mandatory Qualification for Rice Category
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 31 July 2026, partners will be required to set Fda Food Registration Number On Product Label as a mandatory qualification when listing or editing products by using API for Rice Category (Category ID: 917896). “Product Label” information will be put into "certifications" parameter and its image URI will be put to the place "certifications->images->uri". # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local sellers in the Thailand m...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 31 July 2026, partners will be required to set Fda Food Registration Number On Product Label as a mandatory qualification when listing or editing products by using API for Rice Category (Category ID: 917896). “Product Label” information will be put into "certifications" parameter and its image URI will be put to the place "certifications->images->uri". # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local sellers in the Thailand m...

item.title: For All Markets: Sandbox Shops Rate Limiting & Inactive Seller Access Control
item.description: # 1. Overview To improve platform data security and ensure fair use of the Open API, the API Gateway will introduce two new control policies: 1. **Sandbox shop rate limiting** — all sandbox shops will be subject to a unified **QPH limit of 1000**. 2. **Inactive seller/shop access control** — Open API requests from shops or sellers in inactive states will be rejected. Both changes apply at the API Gateway layer and affect how ISV integrations behave under the listed conditions. # 2. What Is Chang...
item.content:encoded: # 1. Overview To improve platform data security and ensure fair use of the Open API, the API Gateway will introduce two new control policies: 1. **Sandbox shop rate limiting** — all sandbox shops will be subject to a unified **QPH limit of 1000**. 2. **Inactive seller/shop access control** — Open API requests from shops or sellers in inactive states will be rejected. Both changes apply at the API Gateway layer and affect how ISV integrations behave under the listed conditions. # 2. What Is Chang...

item.title: For All Markets : Target Collaboration Conflict Pre-Check & Resolution Feature
item.description: # 1. Overview Today, when an ISV creates a target (open) collaboration, it calls [Create Open Collaboration](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/create-open-collaboration-202309) directly and only learns the outcome from the response. Because the creation endpoint enforces a set of business rules (including conflicts with existing target collaborations on the same creator + product), creation **frequently fails**, forcing ISVs into a trial-and-error loop and putting unnecessary load on the...
item.content:encoded: # 1. Overview Today, when an ISV creates a target (open) collaboration, it calls [Create Open Collaboration](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/create-open-collaboration-202309) directly and only learns the outcome from the response. Because the creation endpoint enforces a set of business rules (including conflicts with existing target collaborations on the same creator + product), creation **frequently fails**, forcing ISVs into a trial-and-error loop and putting unnecessary load on the...

item.title: For All Markets : Get Payments API — Migrate from 202309 to 202605
item.description: ## 1. Summary The **Get Payments** API retrieves records of automated payments for a shop based on a specified date range, allowing sellers to verify and reconcile payments against the transactions in their bank account. A new version **202605** has been released. To keep integrations on a single supported version and to remove a deprecated response field, version **202309** will be sunset on 2026-08-15. All ISVs must migrate to **202605** by this date. **Key Deadline — Sunset Date: 2026-08-15.*...
item.content:encoded: ## 1. Summary The **Get Payments** API retrieves records of automated payments for a shop based on a specified date range, allowing sellers to verify and reconcile payments against the transactions in their bank account. A new version **202605** has been released. To keep integrations on a single supported version and to remove a deprecated response field, version **202309** will be sunset on 2026-08-15. All ISVs must migrate to **202605** by this date. **Key Deadline — Sunset Date: 2026-08-15.*...

item.title: For All Markets : Deprecating the Creator Search Affiliate Trace Orders API
item.description: # Summary The [Creator Search Affiliate Trace Orders](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/creator-search-affiliate-trace-orders-202505) API will be fully retired on 2026-08-15 **;** all partners must complete migration before this date to avoid integration failures. This API allowed partners to retrieve a list of affiliate orders generated by a creator, returning the order ID and product ID, so that partners could track affiliate conversions on behalf of a creator. Going forward, developer...
item.content:encoded: # Summary The [Creator Search Affiliate Trace Orders](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/creator-search-affiliate-trace-orders-202505) API will be fully retired on 2026-08-15 **;** all partners must complete migration before this date to avoid integration failures. This API allowed partners to retrieve a list of affiliate orders generated by a creator, returning the order ID and product ID, so that partners could track affiliate conversions on behalf of a creator. Going forward, developer...

item.title: Meet Partner Assistant — Your AI Q&A Copilot in Partner Center
item.description: ## 1. What is Partner Assistant Partner Assistant is an AI Q&A copilot built into TikTok Shop Partner Center. Ask it a question in plain language and get an answer without leaving your current page. Partner Assistant helps you understand the docs, diagnose API errors, find the right reference, and check read-only config — then routes you to a human when you need one. * Knows the docs and the Open Platform. * Aware of the page you're on, so you don't have to re-explain context. * A human is one c...
item.content:encoded: ## 1. What is Partner Assistant Partner Assistant is an AI Q&A copilot built into TikTok Shop Partner Center. Ask it a question in plain language and get an answer without leaving your current page. Partner Assistant helps you understand the docs, diagnose API errors, find the right reference, and check read-only config — then routes you to a human when you need one. * Knows the docs and the Open Platform. * Aware of the page you're on, so you don't have to re-explain context. * A human is one c...

item.title: All Market：Adjust product dimensions to two decimal places
item.description: # Background To support a more consistent product publishing experience across all markets, TikTok Shop will standardize product dimension values to two decimal places. This update is a data-format standardization for dimension fields only. It does not affect weight fields, does not introduce a new business rule, and does not change the data type of the related Product API fields. According to the current Product API design, the affected dimension fields are already defined as string values. Thi...
item.content:encoded: # Background To support a more consistent product publishing experience across all markets, TikTok Shop will standardize product dimension values to two decimal places. This update is a data-format standardization for dimension fields only. It does not affect weight fields, does not introduce a new business rule, and does not change the data type of the related Product API fields. According to the current Product API design, the affected dimension fields are already defined as string values. Thi...

item.title: Gateway HTTP Access to Be Discontinued
item.description: **Breaking change.** From **[2026-06-17]**, the TikTok Shop Open Platform gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will accept **HTTPS only**. Requests sent over plain `http://` will be rejected and will not be processed. Make sure every integration calls the gateway over `https://` before this date to avoid service disruption. # Summary To strengthen the security of data in transit, access to the API gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will move to **HTTPS-only**. Plain-text HTTP access will...
item.content:encoded: **Breaking change.** From **[2026-06-17]**, the TikTok Shop Open Platform gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will accept **HTTPS only**. Requests sent over plain `http://` will be rejected and will not be processed. Make sure every integration calls the gateway over `https://` before this date to avoid service disruption. # Summary To strengthen the security of data in transit, access to the API gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will move to **HTTPS-only**. Plain-text HTTP access will...

item.title: For Philippine market: Updates to Mandatory Attributes on Chair Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 4 August 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Chairs 876040, Outdoor Chairs 877704 and Chairs 879624. The mandatory product attributes will include : * Material / 100701 * If "Material = Plastic"", "PS/ICC No. / 101073” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local and cross border sellers in the P...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 4 August 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Chairs 876040, Outdoor Chairs 877704 and Chairs 879624. The mandatory product attributes will include : * Material / 100701 * If "Material = Plastic"", "PS/ICC No. / 101073” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local and cross border sellers in the P...

item.title: For Malaysia market: Updates to Mandatory Attributes on Beauty & Wellness Supplement Related Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 9 July 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Beauty Supplement 700648, Fitness Supplements 700649, Vitamins, Minerals & Wellness Supplements 700650 and Herbal Supplements 2160400. The mandatory product attributes will include : * NPRA Registered * If "NPRA Registered = Yes", "MAL No. / 101088” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 9 July 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Beauty Supplement 700648, Fitness Supplements 700649, Vitamins, Minerals & Wellness Supplements 700650 and Herbal Supplements 2160400. The mandatory product attributes will include : * NPRA Registered * If "NPRA Registered = Yes", "MAL No. / 101088” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of ...

item.title: Product APIs support regular Auction Product CRUD
item.description: # Summary ### What is changing Regular auction products are now supported across the Product API lifecycle. Developers can create and update regular auction products, and can identify auction status and starting bid information when reading product data. This release applies only to **regular auction products**. **Temporary Listing Auction Product** is out of scope for this release. ### Why this is changing This update extends auction product operations from Seller Center to the API channel, so ...
item.content:encoded: # Summary ### What is changing Regular auction products are now supported across the Product API lifecycle. Developers can create and update regular auction products, and can identify auction status and starting bid information when reading product data. This release applies only to **regular auction products**. **Temporary Listing Auction Product** is out of scope for this release. ### Why this is changing This update extends auction product operations from Seller Center to the API channel, so ...

item.title: Full Account Development Shop supports manual order status updates
item.description: **Summary** The Full Function Account Development Shop now supports manual order status updates for test orders placed in the TikTok App. This helps merchants and developers validate end-to-end forward and reverse order flows in the sandbox without relying on real fulfillment. [Development Shop Manual Order Status Update Guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/ar5ppjvv) # Highlights The Development Shop capability has been expanded so that test orders created from the TikTok App can now...
item.content:encoded: **Summary** The Full Function Account Development Shop now supports manual order status updates for test orders placed in the TikTok App. This helps merchants and developers validate end-to-end forward and reverse order flows in the sandbox without relying on real fulfillment. [Development Shop Manual Order Status Update Guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/ar5ppjvv) # Highlights The Development Shop capability has been expanded so that test orders created from the TikTok App can now...

item.title: Seller Access & Sandbox Rate Limit Updates
item.description: ## What's Changing ### 1. Inactive Seller Access Restriction TikTok Shop will restrict API access for seller or shop accounts that are in an **inactive status** (e.g., deactivated, closing, or otherwise unavailable). ### 2. Sandbox Account Rate Limit Update To optimize resource allocation, we are updating the rate limits for testing environments: * **Affected Users:** Developers making API calls using **test accounts or sandbox accounts**. * **Threshold:** Requests may be throttled with a **429 ...
item.content:encoded: ## What's Changing ### 1. Inactive Seller Access Restriction TikTok Shop will restrict API access for seller or shop accounts that are in an **inactive status** (e.g., deactivated, closing, or otherwise unavailable). ### 2. Sandbox Account Rate Limit Update To optimize resource allocation, we are updating the rate limits for testing environments: * **Affected Users:** Developers making API calls using **test accounts or sandbox accounts**. * **Threshold:** Requests may be throttled with a **429 ...

item.title: Analytics API Response Data Optimization
item.description: # Overview This release introduces three new versioned Analytics APIs that deliver enriched Seller Compass data, achieving full metric parity between the OpenAPI and the Seller Center Data Compass UI. Developers can now programmatically access comprehensive product performance metrics (including traffic funnel, conversion, and channel-level attribution), video performance metrics (with creator attribution and engagement data), and bestselling product image information — eliminating the need for ...
item.content:encoded: # Overview This release introduces three new versioned Analytics APIs that deliver enriched Seller Compass data, achieving full metric parity between the OpenAPI and the Seller Center Data Compass UI. Developers can now programmatically access comprehensive product performance metrics (including traffic funnel, conversion, and channel-level attribution), video performance metrics (with creator attribution and engagement data), and bestselling product image information — eliminating the need for ...

item.title: US/MX/SEA Market：Support product weight and dimensions at the SKU level
item.description: # What is changing? TikTok Shop is introducing **SKU-level dimension and weight support** in Partner APIs. This update allows product weight and dimensions to be maintained and synchronized at the SKU level, which improves shipping-related accuracy for products with multiple variants. Previously, weight and dimension data were mainly handled at the product level. With this release, APIs now support dedicated SKU-level fields so partners can send and retrieve more precise package information for ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? TikTok Shop is introducing **SKU-level dimension and weight support** in Partner APIs. This update allows product weight and dimensions to be maintained and synchronized at the SKU level, which improves shipping-related accuracy for products with multiple variants. Previously, weight and dimension data were mainly handled at the product level. With this release, APIs now support dedicated SKU-level fields so partners can send and retrieve more precise package information for ...

item.title: Enhanced Get Tracking API for CBT First-Mile Pickup Visibility
item.description: **Effective date:** June 30, 2026 (target — final date confirmed at general availability) **API version:** `v202604` or later **Audience:** Apps that integrate with TikTok Shop logistics APIs for CBT orders ## Overview TikTok Shop is releasing an enhanced **Get Tracking API** that exposes the full end-to-end tracking history of CBT parcels — including the **first-mile pickup leg** that is currently missing from most App systems. Starting in late June 2026, your app can call a single endpoint to ...
item.content:encoded: **Effective date:** June 30, 2026 (target — final date confirmed at general availability) **API version:** `v202604` or later **Audience:** Apps that integrate with TikTok Shop logistics APIs for CBT orders ## Overview TikTok Shop is releasing an enhanced **Get Tracking API** that exposes the full end-to-end tracking history of CBT parcels — including the **first-mile pickup leg** that is currently missing from most App systems. Starting in late June 2026, your app can call a single endpoint to ...
